request_text: File a GitHub issue on Priivacy-ai/spec-kitty to scrutinize the codex agent setup: the repo has codex listed in .kittify/config.yaml but no .agents/ directory exists, meaning the skills-preamble harness (Pattern D) was never installed. The issue should: (1) document the gap — codex is configured but .agents/skills/ is absent so orientation blocks and skill files are missing; (2) propose a spec-kitty doctor command that detects this mismatch between config.yaml agent list and actual harness directories; (3) propose a spec-kitty upgrade migration that repairs it by writing the missing .agents/skills/ structure. File the issue via gh on Priivacy-ai/spec-kitty.
